title: Badlands Drain Route
notes: Extends west from B5 Black Road Drains to the Dust-9 badlands edge.
Badlands culvert route with rusted service bridge, smuggler cutoff, crawl deck, Sable water-cache cell, abandoned utility pads, and flooded drain mouth.
Flooded center is mostly blocked; raised bridge/platforms and service edges are walkable/driveable.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
